title: TableIR
description: Intermediate representation between VedaLang source and Excel output. Enforces canonical tidy long-by-year format.

files.description: List of Excel workbook files to generate

file.description: An Excel workbook file containing one or more worksheets

path.description: Relative path to the Excel file (e.g., 'base/base.xlsx')

sheets.description: List of worksheets in this workbook

sheet.description: A worksheet within an Excel workbook containing VEDA tables

name.description: Name of the worksheet (Excel tab name)

notes.description: Optional free-text lines emitted directly onto the worksheet before any VEDA tables. Useful for human-readable documentation tabs.

tables.description: List of VEDA tables on this worksheet

table.description: A VEDA table identified by its tag, containing data rows

tag.description: VEDA tag identifying the table type (e.g., '~FI_PROCESS', '~FI_T', '~TFM_INS')

uc_sets.description: UC scope declarations for user constraint tables (~UC_T). Keys are VEDA UC set codes (R_E, R_S, T_E, T_S, T_SUC, TS_E, TS_S), values are the scope (e.g., 'AllRegions', region list, or empty string).

rows.description: List of data rows in the table

row.description: A data row containing column-value pairs. Column names must be alphanumeric (canonical long format).

propertyNames.description: Column names: alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores/colons/dots. No 4-digit years as column names (use long format with year column).

additionalProperties.description: Values must be string, number, or boolean. No interpolation markers (I, E) allowed.
